occupation: Director and Chief Technology Officer, IBM Skills Network
headline: Director and Chief Technology Officer, IBM Skills Network
summary: Leon Katsnelson is the Director and Chief Technology Officer for IBM Skills Network. He leads the development of next generation learning technologies, including integration of LLMs and generative AI to create personalized learning experiences for millions of learners around the globe.

experiences.title: Director and Chief Technology Officer, IBM Skills Network
experiences.description: Leading the architecture and development of the IBM Skills Network platform, integrating AI and modern cloud native architectures to serve millions of students.

experiences.title: Director, Emerging Technologies
experiences.description: Directed engineering teams on advanced analytics, distributed computing, and emerging open source software.
